name: better-correct
description: Obsidian desktop plugin that reduces false spellcheck warnings for technical terms.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.verify-release: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const required=['manifest.json','main.js','styles.css'];for(const file of required){if(!fs.existsSync(file)){throw new Error('Missing release artifact: '+file);}}const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8'));if(manifest.id!=='better-correct'){throw new Error('manifest.id must equal plugin folder name better-correct');}console.log('release layout ok');"
scripts.release: npm run check && npm run verify-release
